sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27668" key="dixo/zwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐχό-ζωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27668.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διχόμηνος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
